data.body: LANDED via Gerrit (satisfies the 'passes CI + lands via Gerrit' AC). Gerrit change 644 (https://rebar.solutions.navateam.com/c/rebar/+/644) — LLM-Review +1 AND Verified +1 (CI green: build/test/lint/typecheck on GitHub Actions) — atomic-submitted as part of the stack and merged to main as commit f943c7ef5 ('speed up gerrit-verify: curricular-brickred-ratfish: parallelize the gating suite with pytest-xdist + fix coverage-combine'). Verified: origin/main now contains f943c7ef5.
